questions.statement: A common internal tangent for two circles measures 18 cm. The distance between the centers of these circles is 30 cm. If the larger circle has a radius of 16 cm, what is the radius of the smaller circle?
Triangle XYZ has its centroid at point G(8, 10) and vertex X at (4, 6). If point M is the midpoint of the side YZ, find the coordinates of point M. ?

Two tangents, PA and PB, are drawn from an external point P to a circle with a radius of 10 cm. If the angle between the two tangents is 90 degrees, what is the distance from point P to the center of the circle?

<p>Triangle ABC has two equal-sized halves, D and E, which are points on AB and AC, respectively, such that DE is parallel to BC. So, what is the AD: BD ratio?</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//cdn.testbook.com/images/production/quesImages/qImage694a94ea74bc5796823c3a00.png" /><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/26/01/Task%20Id%202016%20Daman%20%281%29.png" style="width: 150px; height: 200px;" /></p>
In a trapezoid PQRS with PQ parallel to RS, the diagonals PR and QS intersect at O. What is the ratio of the area of triangle POQ to the area of triangle ROS?
options: The ratio of PQ to RS squared /
The ratio of PQ to RS /
The ratio of the perimeter of triangle POQ to ROS /
The ratio of the area of triangle PQS to QRS /
